creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
The author has finished changing ISPs and has returned to a
FreeBSD-friendly naming system (he's kept a symlink with the old name, so
the distfile is still available--nothing urgent).  Here are corresponding
changes to the port.  I'm the maintainer.

How-To-Repeat: 
Try to browse the Web page that used to be on www.clark.net.
